title: Modular Cognitive Architecture Emerges in Large Language Models
abstract: Have you ever thought of large language models as know-it-alls who know everything but lack flexibility? Well, get ready for a surprise: these models are now developing modular cognitive architectures, akin to adding plugins to a computer. They can not only answer factual questions but also help write poetry, craft stories, and even play riddles with you! Come try it out and see if this new skill will amaze you!
abstract_zh: 你是不是觉得大语言模型就像个无所不知的老学究，啥都知道但就是不接地气？现在告诉你一个好消息：这些模型终于开始有了模块化的心智结构，就像给电脑装上了插件一样灵活！这下它们不仅能回答百科知识，还能帮忙写诗、编故事，甚至和你一起玩脑筋急转弯。赶紧来试试吧，看看这新技能是不是能让你大吃一惊！
